questions.question: Explain the primary function of a MAC protocol.
expectedPoints: manage access to a shared communication medium

questions.question: Describe the different types of MAC protocols and their functions.
Identify the advantages and disadvantages of each MAC protocol.
Explain the purpose of framing in MAC protocols.
expectedPoints: add headers and trailers to the data

questions.question: Describe the operation of CSMA/CD and Token Ring protocols.
